---
title: "Letters on Daily Life"
---

## Letters on Daily Life

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1885
**Imprint:** London: Walter Smith

### Notes

Originally published in <i>MP</i> (January 1883-June 1884).

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
